subcodes.first_line: O kindred and kin of that distinguished pilgrim, the seeker after the Ka'bah of his heart's desire, the noble Rustam, master of the bow and devoted friend, as he approacheth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خویش و پیوند جناب زائر قاصد کعبه مقصود جناب رستم تیرانداز ودود چون بساحت
